languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, великие жертвы это, конечно здорово и красиво, но только если они осмысленны. Просто сослав кучу псайкеров в тартарары, вы рискуете устроить такой прорыв вуали, что Погонщицы покажутся вам безобидными цветочками! Мы уже знаем, что этих тварей в ярость приводит какой-то сигнал из глубин планеты — вот и снарядите экспедицию к его источнику и зарубите проблему на корню!"

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, великие жертвы это, конечно здорово и красиво, но только если они осмысленны. Просто сослав кучу псайкеров в тартарары, вы рискуете устроить такой прорыв вуали, что Погонщицы покажутся вам безобидными цветочками! Мы уже знаем, что этих тварей в ярость приводит какой-то сигнал из глубин планеты — вот и снарядите экспедицию к его источнику и зарубите проблему на корню!"

languages.text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, великие жертвы это, конечно здорово и красиво, но только если они осмысленны. Просто сослав кучу псайкеров в тартарары, вы рискуете устроить такой прорыв вуали, что Погонщицы покажутся вам безобидными цветочками! Мы уже знаем, что этих тварей в ярость приводит какой-то сигнал из глубин планеты — вот и снарядите экспедицию к его источнику и зарубите проблему на корню!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers into the void risks tearing such a breach in the veil that the Drovers will seem as harmless cherubim by comparison! We already know these creatures are driven to frenzy by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out at the root!"

"Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

"{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract xenos for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

"Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers into the void risks tearing such a breach in the veil that the Drovers will seem as harmless cherubim by comparison! We already know these creatures are driven to frenzy by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out at the root!"

"Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

languages.text: 「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異星人{/g}を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは…保護領にはきっと役立つでしょう」
languages.original_text: "{name}, I know psykers are dangerous, of course — but look at me. I'm hardly a waste of the ship's oxygen, am I? Psykers with more experience can tear through the veil of the Immaterium with precision, like a medicae officer opening up a wound — then the echoes will attract {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} for a long time to come. And the most talented psykers... well, I'm sure you could find a use for them in the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: 「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは hardly 言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が異星人を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは… protectorate にはきっと役立つでしょう。」
「{name}、サイカーは危険な存在であることはわかっています。でも、私を見てください。私は船の酸素を無駄にしているとは言えません。経験豊富なサイカーは、外科医が傷を開けるように、精巧に物質界のベールを裂き、その反響が{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}異星人{/g}を引き寄せるのです。そして最も才能のあるサイカーは…保護領にはきっと役立つでしょう」

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, los grandes sacrificios están muy bien y son un espectáculo impresionante, pero solo cuando tienen un propósito. ¡Enviar a cientos de psíquicos a su muerte puede abrir una brecha en el velo que hará que los Pastores parezcan inofensivos! Ya sabemos que estas criaturas entran en frenesí al recibir una señal de las profundidades del planeta. ¡Organice una expedición a su origen y elimine el problema de raíz!».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, los grandes sacrificios están muy bien y son un espectáculo impresionante, pero solo cuando tienen un propósito. ¡Enviar a cientos de psíquicos a su muerte puede abrir una brecha en el velo que hará que los Pastores parezcan inofensivos! Ya sabemos que estas criaturas entran en frenesí al recibir una señal de las profundidades del planeta. ¡Organice una expedición a su origen y elimine el problema de raíz!».

languages.text: “舰长大人，盛大的献祭当然没什么不好，场面也确实够壮观——但前提是它真能起作用。把成群的灵能者赶去送死，极有可能在障壁上撕开一道巨大的裂口，到时候拒生花都算是人畜无害的智天使了！我们已经知道，这些怪物的狂暴行为源于行星深处发出的某种信号。派考察队前往信号源头，把这个麻烦连根拔掉吧！”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，盛大的献祭当然没什么不好，场面也确实够壮观——但前提是它真能起作用。把成群的灵能者赶去送死，极有可能在障壁上撕开一道巨大的裂口，到时候拒生花都算是人畜无害的智天使了！我们已经知道，这些怪物的狂暴行为源于行星深处发出的某种信号。派考察队前往信号源头，把这个麻烦连根拔掉吧！”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, große Opfer sind ja schön und gut für ein feines Spektakel, allerdings nur, wenn sie einem Zweck dienen. Eine Herde Psioniker in den Tod zu schicken, könnte einen Riss im Schleier nach sich ziehen, gegen den die Treiber harmlose Cherubim währen! Wir wissen bereits, dass diese Kreaturen durch ein Signal aus den Tiefen dieses Planeten in Raserei versetzt werden. Schickt eine Expedition zu dessen Ursprung und löst das Problem an der Wurzel."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, große Opfer sind ja schön und gut für ein feines Spektakel, allerdings nur, wenn sie einem Zweck dienen. Eine Herde Psioniker in den Tod zu schicken, könnte einen Riss im Schleier nach sich ziehen, gegen den die Treiber harmlose Cherubim währen! Wir wissen bereits, dass diese Kreaturen durch ein Signal aus den Tiefen dieses Planeten in Raserei versetzt werden. Schickt eine Expedition zu dessen Ursprung und löst das Problem an der Wurzel."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, büyük fedakârlıklar güzel hoştur ve iyi bir seyirlik sunar. Tabii bir amaca hizmet ediyorlarsa. Ruhsezer sürüsünü ölüme gütmek, örtüyü Çobanları zararsız bebekler gibi gösterecek kadar yırtma riskini taşır! Zaten bu yaratıkların gezegenin derinliklerinden gelen bir sinyalle çıldırdıklarını biliyoruz. Kaynağına bir keşif seferi düzenleyin ve sorunu kökünden çözün!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, c'est bien beau, les sacrifices, mais encore faut-il qu'ils servent un but précis. Envoyer à l'abattoir une pléiade de psykers risque d'ouvrir une large brèche dans le voile, auquel cas les Chasseurs seraient le cadet de nos soucis ! Nous savons que ces créatures sont mues par un signal provenant des tréfonds de la planète. Montez une expédition et partez arracher le problème à la racine ! »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, grand sacrifices are all well and good, and they make for a fine spectacle, but only if they serve a purpose. Herding a mass of psykers to their deaths risks tearing such a breach in the veil that will make the Drovers seem like harmless cherubim! We already know these creatures are driven into frenzies by a signal from deep within the planet. Mount an expedition to its source and cut the problem out by the root!"
